daily.today_energy: Your intuitive radar is absolutely sharp right now. Trust those gut feelings that pop up—they're basically your soul's way of texting you important updates. Channel this clarity into something meaningful.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, vulnerability is your superpower today. Share something real. Single? Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. The energy around connection feels genuinely warm and reciprocal.
daily.career: Your creative solutions are hitting different today. Don't dim your ideas in meetings—they have serious potential. This is a solid moment to speak up about what you actually want moving forward.
daily.health: Your body's asking for slower, gentler movement today. Think intentional stretching or a walk that actually feels good, not rushed. Mental rest matters just as much as physical—give yourself permission to step back.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is basically on steroids this week, Cancer. Trust those gut feelings—they're not just vibes, they're your superpower trying to tell you something real. Expect unexpected shifts that actually feel right.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, emotional honesty is hitting different rn. If you've been holding back how you really feel, this week's giving permission to be vulnerable. Real connection > surface level, always.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaking and people are noticing. Don't sleep on that idea you've been sitting on—conditions are aligning for you to pitch or start something. Your effort compounds this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for deeper rest, not just sleep. Explore what actually grounds you—could be movement, stillness, or something in between. Listen to what feels nourishing rather than obligatory.
